structure: one subdirectory per run or stage (for example gemma-recovery-2026-07-18, capability-preflight), each containing the raw output JSONL files, the run manifest, the usage ledger, and a SHA256SUMS manifest listing every archived file
retrieval_policy: append-only: copies are written immediately after a run completes and are never edited in place; before any analysis reuse, recompute the SHA256SUMS entries and halt on any mismatch
physical_medium: dedicated local E: drive (verified 2026-07-18: 3.5 TB free), separate from the C: working drive
code_provenance: git history pushed to github.com/jackmaiorino/selvarath-debate branch rerun-new-models
scope: raw records, manifests, and ledgers for the Gemma recovery supplement, capability preflight, canary, and main run
note: Policy record only; grants no execution authority.
